pods.name: Humyn Labs — Audio
pods.note: Multi-pipeline: validation, annotation, collection, account infra & data ops

items.feature: Optimise the responsiveness of the annotation system; currently we can process 16Khrs/month
POC on emotions and acoustic tagging auto QC
Enable Structural checks in the system
Enable new recorder for single speaker audios
Creating Feedback Loop for a self learning tool using the changes made by annotators on the pre-annotation
Building a recursive learning platform for low resource languages
Enable language specific scripts on quests created per language
New post-processing service for data delivery(cross account/ cross org/ copy of data to client bucket)
Annotation pipeline for automatic submissions based on project configs
APP: Click reduction on the quest journey - App & Task 2 and Task 1 in Quest
Validation test on Stark Samples for unitelligible cases

teamUpdates.name: Kawaljeet
teamUpdates.status: To Let Go by End of June or Mid July

teamUpdates.name: Yuvaraj
teamUpdates.status: To be analysed on Egocentric testing

devsecEpics.name: Endpoint Security Rollout
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy SentinelOne to 120 endpoints, including pilot and full rollout.

devsecEpics.name: Cloud CNAPP & Workload Protection
devsecEpics.desc: Implement CNAPP and deploy agents to 143 workloads for protection.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Deployment & Log Onboarding
devsecEpics.desc: Procure and deploy Splunk with prioritized log ingestion for monitoring.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Deployment & Compliance
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy MDM across corporate devices with policy enforcement for compliance.

devsecEpics.name: Build Security Operations Team
devsecEpics.desc: Hire and onboard required security roles to establish the SOC team.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Commercial & Legal Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete commercial, financial, and legal procurement cycle for Splunk.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Commercial & Licensing Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete vendor selection and procurement cycle for MDM solution.

devsecEpics.name: Procurement Governance & Vendor Mgmt
devsecEpics.desc: Ensure structured governance for all security tool purchases and renewals.

devsecEpics.name: Cloudflare WAF Deployment
devsecEpics.desc: Implement and tune WAF protection for critical domains (humynlabs, kgen, kratos, exlr8).

devsecEpics.name: Remove Public Exposure for Non-Critical Apps
devsecEpics.desc: Reduce external attack surface across humynlabs, kgen, kratos, exlr8 by limiting public exposure.

devsecEpics.name: Investigate Multi-Cloud Infections & Anomalies
devsecEpics.desc: Perform deep threat investigation across multi-cloud environments (AWS, GCP, Cloudflare).

devsecEpics.name: K8s Security Posture Review (GKE & AWS)
devsecEpics.desc: Perform comprehensive Kubernetes Security Posture Management review for GKE and new AWS clusters.

devsecEpics.name: Post-Migration Security Review: EKS
devsecEpics.desc: Perform security validation and hardening of the new AWS EKS cluster post-migration.

devsecEpics.name: Design K8s Cluster Segregation
devsecEpics.desc: Design architecture for segregating workloads into multiple clusters to reduce blast radius.
